description: Write the filtered dataset into the project SQLite database with full source tracking. Every row MUST carry _operation_id, _source_file, _source_version, _source_row. Idempotent: if operation_id already committed, return early with existing counts.

operation_id.description: From apply_exclusions. Used for idempotency check + stamped on every row as _operation_id.

source_file.description: Archived source filename (basename of archived_path). Stamped on rows as _source_file.

source_sha256.description: Stamped as _source_version for long-term traceability across file revisions.

table_plan.description: One entry per target table. Must align with proposed_tables confirmed by user.

mode.description: create = new table (fail if exists). append = INSERT into existing. replace = DROP + create.

column_mapping.description: Optional explicit map from source column → DB column. If absent, use source names as-is (snake_cased).

batch_size.description: INSERT batch size. Default 1000 per CLAUDE.md technical constraints.

db_path.description: Absolute path to the SQLite DB that was modified. Must contain 'workspace/db/' to satisfy workflow required_outputs.

tracking_columns_added.description: Tracking columns that were created/ensured on this run (e.g. ['_operation_id','_source_file','_source_version','_source_row']).

idempotency_status.description: fresh_insert = first time operation_id was seen. skipped = operation_id already present in DB, nothing written.
